remedies.remedy_desc: Nettle tea helps with clear skin because it has anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce redness and swelling associated with acne, while its rich nutrient content, including vitamin C, helps build collagen and promotes skin cell growth. The tea's ability to support the body's detoxification processes can also help eliminate toxins, reducing the likelihood of skin breakouts. Furthermore, nettle tea's antihistamine properties can alleviate allergic reactions that may manifest as skin issues. Lastly, its astringent qualities can help tighten pores and reduce excess oil production, contributing to an overall clearer complexion.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 cups of fresh nettle leaves (Urtica dioica) from a clean, pesticide-free location, rinse them thoroughly, and then submerge in 4 cups of boiling water for 5-7 minutes to extract the beneficial compounds and achieve a deep green color.

After steepment, strain the tea through a fine-mesh sieve or cheesecloth into a teapot or heat-resistant container, catching and discarding any residual plant material while preserving the nutrient-rich liquid.

Optional: To enhance the tea's skin-clearing properties, consider adding 1 tablespoon of honey, a natural anti-inflammatory and humectant, or a squeeze of lemon juice for its vitamin C content and additional antibacterial benefits.
Serve the tea hot or chilled, as desired, and enjoy daily for at least 2-4 weeks to allow the skin-enhancing nutrients to accumulate and promote a clearer, more radiant complexion.
For optimal freshness and potency, store any leftover nettle tea in the refrigerator for up to 3 days, gently reheating or serving chilled as preferred.

remedies.remedy_desc: Burdock tea helps with clear skin because it has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help reduce redness and swelling, while also fighting acne-causing bacteria. It also contains antioxidants that help protect skin cells from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to a clearer complexion. Additionally, burdock tea is known to promote blood circulation and improve liver function, both of which can support healthy skin. The tea's diuretic properties can also help eliminate toxins from the body, which can further contribute to clearer skin. Finally, burdock tea has been used traditionally as a depurative, helping to cleanse the blood and eliminate impurities, which can help reduce the likelihood of skin breakouts and promote a clearer, healthier complexion.
remedy_recipe: Rinse and chop 2-3 tablespoons of dried burdock root into small pieces, then add them to a pot with 4 cups of water; bring the water to a boil.
Once boiling, reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and let it simmer for 15-20 minutes to extract the beneficial compounds.
Strain the tea into a teapot or a heat-resistant container, discarding the spent burdock root pieces.
For added flavor and potential skin benefits, consider adding optional ingredients such as a slice of lemon, a teaspoon of honey, or a small piece of grated ginger before serving.
Drink the burdock tea while warm, ideally 1-2 times a day, consistently for at least a few weeks to see improvements in skin clarity and complexion.

remedies.remedy_desc: Dandelion tea helps with clear skin because it has anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce skin redness and swelling. It also contains high levels of antioxidants that help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, promoting skin cell regeneration and a more even skin tone. Furthermore, dandelion tea has natural diuretic properties that can help eliminate toxins from the body, reducing the likelihood of skin breakouts and promoting a clearer complexion. Additionally, it is rich in vitamins A, C, and E, which are essential for maintaining healthy skin and preventing premature aging. Lastly, dandelion tea has been shown to improve digestion and liver function, which can also contribute to clearer skin by promoting the elimination of waste and toxins from the body.
remedy_recipe: Gather 1-2 handfuls of fresh dandelion flowers, ensuring they are free of chemicals and pollutants, then rinse them gently in cold water and let them dry.
Chop the dried dandelion flowers coarsely, then place them in a pot and add 4 cups of water; bring the mixture to a boil.
Once boiling, reduce heat to low, cover the pot, and let it simmer for 15-20 minutes to extract the beneficial compounds from the flowers.
Strain the tea into a cup or teapot, discarding the spent flowers, and let the tea cool down to a drinkable temperature; add honey or lemon to taste, if desired.
Drink 2-3 cups of this dandelion tea daily for at least a month, as clearer skin may take time to appear, and maintain a consistent skincare routine for optimal results.

remedies.remedy_desc: Red clover tea helps with clear skin because it contains isoflavones, which are a type of plant estrogen that can help to regulate hormonal imbalances in the body. These imbalances can often be a major cause of skin problems such as acne. Additionally, red clover has anti-inflammatory properties that can help to reduce redness and swelling in the skin, which can also contribute to a clearer complexion. Furthermore, red clover is rich in antioxidants, which can help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and other environmental stressors. This can lead to healthier, more youthful-looking skin. Finally, red clover has been shown to have diuretic properties, which can help to flush toxins out of the body and support overall liver function. A healthy liver is essential for clear, radiant skin.
remedy_recipe: To make red clover tea for clear skin, start by boiling 2 cups of water in a pot, then add 2 teaspoons of dried red clover flowers and leaves; reduce heat to a simmer.
Allow the mixture to steep for 15-20 minutes, covered, for the beneficial compounds from the red clover to be fully extracted.
Strain the tea to remove the solid plant material, then let it cool down to a drinkable temperature.
For added skin-clearing benefits, consider adding the juice of half a lemon and a small piece of grated ginger to your tea.
Drink 2-3 cups of this red clover tea daily, consistently, for at least a few weeks to see improvements in your skin's clarity and overall health.

remedies.remedy_desc: Yellow dock tea helps with clear skin because it contains high levels of iron and other minerals that support liver function, which is essential for healthy skin. The tea's natural anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce redness and swelling associated with acne and other skin conditions. Yellow dock tea also has blood-purifying qualities, which can help eliminate toxins from the body that can lead to skin issues. Additionally, the tea's high levels of vitamin C can boost collagen production, promoting skin elasticity and overall skin health. Finally, yellow dock tea's astringent properties can help tighten pores and reduce oil production, leading to clearer, healthier-looking skin.
remedy_recipe: To make yellow dock tea, start by boiling 2 cups of water in a pot, then add 2 teaspoons of dried yellow dock root, reducing heat to a simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Strain the tea to remove the root, then let it cool down to a drinkable temperature.
For added flavor and skin benefits, squeeze half a lemon and add 1 tablespoon of raw honey to the tea.
Stir well until the honey is fully dissolved, creating a soothing and slightly sweet beverage.
Drink the yellow dock tea once or twice a day, consistently, to help promote clear skin and support overall skin health.

remedies.remedy_desc: Sarsaparilla tea helps with clear skin because it has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help reduce skin inflammation and fight acne-causing bacteria. Additionally, it contains compounds called saponins, which have been shown to have cleansing and purifying effects on the body, helping to eliminate toxins that can lead to skin problems. Sarsaparilla tea is also rich in antioxidants, which can help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and promote skin cell regeneration for a more even and radiant complexion. Furthermore, it has been used traditionally as a blood purifier, helping to remove impurities from the blood that can manifest as skin issues. Drinking sarsaparilla tea regularly can contribute to an overall improvement in skin health and appearance.
remedy_recipe: In a pot, bring 2 cups of water to a boil, then add 1 tablespoon of dried sarsaparilla root and let it simmer for 15-20 minutes to extract the beneficial compounds.

After simmering, remove the pot from heat and add 1 teaspoon of honey (or to taste) and 1/2 teaspoon of lemon juice to the sarsaparilla tea, stirring well to dissolve the honey and balance the flavors.
Allow the tea to cool down to a drinkable temperature, then strain the liquid through a fine-mesh sieve into a mug or teacup to remove the sarsaparilla root pieces.
To enhance the tea's skin-clearing properties, add 1/2 teaspoon of chlorella powder or spirulina powder (optional) to the tea and stir well until fully combined.
Drink the sarsaparilla tea while it's still warm, once or twice a day, for at least two weeks to see improvements in your skin's clarity and overall health.

remedies.remedy_desc: Cleavers tea helps with clear skin because it has potent anti-inflammatory and depurative properties that assist in cleansing the body of toxins. This natural diuretic herb supports the lymphatic system, helping to eliminate waste and reduce swelling, which can lead to healthier skin. Cleavers also contain essential nutrients, like vitamins A, C, and E, that promote skin cell regeneration and help maintain collagen levels, contributing to a smoother, more radiant complexion. Furthermore, its antibacterial and antifungal properties can help combat skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and psoriasis. Drinking cleavers tea regularly can help reduce skin irritations and blemishes, resulting in a clearer, revitalized appearance.
remedy_recipe: Begin by boiling 2 cups of water, then add 2 teaspoons of dried cleavers herb, reducing heat to a simmer for 10-15 minutes to allow the nutrients to steep.
Strain the tea into a cup, discarding the used herbs, then squeeze half a lemon into the tea for its vitamin C content and additional skin-clearing benefits.
Add honey to taste, if desired, for its antibacterial properties and natural sweetness.
Stir in 1 teaspoon of apple cider vinegar, which can help balance the skin's pH and reduce inflammation.
Drink the tea while still warm, up to three times a day for clearer skin in a few weeks.

remedies.remedy_desc: Milk thistle tea helps with clear skin because it contains silymarin, an antioxidant that helps reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which can lead to skin breakouts. Additionally, milk thistle has anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe irritated skin and reduce redness. Furthermore, it has been shown to have a positive effect on liver health, which is important for maintaining clear skin as the liver plays a crucial role in eliminating toxins from the body. Milk thistle tea may also help regulate hormonal imbalances, which can contribute to acne and other skin issues. Lastly, milk thistle has been used for centuries as a natural remedy for various health conditions, including skin problems, and its benefits have been supported by numerous scientific studies.
remedy_recipe: To make milk thistle tea for clear skin, start by bringing 1 cup of water to a boil, then add 1 teaspoon of dried milk thistle flowers or 1 milk thistle tea bag to the boiling water.
Allow the milk thistle to steep in the hot water for 5-10 minutes to extract its beneficial compounds and achieve a strong tea flavor.
While the tea is steeping, finely chop a small piece of fresh ginger root (about the size of your thumb) and squeeze the juice of half a lemon into a separate cup or mug.
After the milk thistle has steeped, strain the tea (if using loose flowers) and pour the liquid into the cup with the ginger and lemon juice.
Mix the ingredients well and enjoy your homemade milk thistle tea for clear skin, ideally drinking it 1-2 times a day, preferably before meals.

remedies.remedy_desc: Chaparral tea helps with clear skin because it contains anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help reduce redness, swelling, and fight bacteria that can lead to acne and other skin irritations. The tea is also rich in antioxidants, which can help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and promote cell regeneration, resulting in a more even skin tone and texture. Additionally, chaparral tea has been shown to improve digestion and liver function, which can help eliminate toxins from the body that may contribute to skin problems. The tea's anti-inflammatory properties can also help soothe skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis, reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Finally, drinking chaparral tea regularly can help boost the immune system, making it easier for the body to fight off infections and other factors that can lead to skin issues.
remedy_recipe: To make chaparral tea for clear skin, start by boiling 1 cup of water in a small pot, then add 1-2 teaspoons of dried chaparral leaves and let it simmer for 5-7 minutes.
After simmering, remove the pot from heat and let the tea cool down for a few minutes before straining out the leaves using a fine mesh strainer.
For added benefits, consider adding 1/4 teaspoon of licorice root powder and 1/4 teaspoon of turmeric powder to the tea before straining.
Drink the tea while it's still warm, 1-2 times a day, preferably on an empty stomach for best results.
Consistency is key, so make sure to drink chaparral tea regularly for at least a month to see improvements in your skin's clarity and overall health.

remedies.remedy_desc: Echinacea tea helps with clear skin because it has anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce redness and swelling associated with skin conditions such as acne. It also has antioxidant properties that can help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can lead to premature aging and skin blemishes. Furthermore, echinacea has been shown to boost the immune system, which can help the body fight off infections that can cause skin breakouts. Additionally, echinacea may help regulate sebum production, reducing the likelihood of clogged pores and acne. However, it's important to note that while echinacea tea can be a helpful addition to a clear skin regimen, it should not be relied on as the sole solution, and a consistent skincare routine and healthy lifestyle are also crucial for maintaining clear and healthy skin.
remedy_recipe: Begin by boiling 2 cups of water in a pot, then add 2 teaspoons of dried echinacea flowers and leaves, allowing the mixture to steep for 15-20 minutes.
While the tea is steeping, finely chop a small piece of fresh ginger root (about the size of your thumb) and add it to the pot.

After steeping, strain the tea to remove the solid plant material, then squeeze the juice of half a lemon into the liquid and stir in 1-2 teaspoons of raw honey for added sweetness and immune support.
For an extra boost to clear skin, grate a small amount of fresh turmeric root (about the size of a fingernail) into the tea and stir well.
Serve the tea hot, sip slowly, and enjoy the soothing and rejuvenating effects of this natural echinacea tea for clear skin.

remedies.remedy_desc: Pau d'arco tea helps with clear skin because it has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with acne and other skin conditions. The tea is made from the bark of the pau d'arco tree, which contains compounds called naphthoquinones that have been shown to kill bacteria and fungi, including those that can cause skin infections. Additionally, pau d'arco tea has been found to have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help soothe irritated skin and reduce the production of excess oil, a common cause of acne. Furthermore, the tea is rich in antioxidants that can help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, reducing the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and age spots. Finally, drinking pau d'arco tea can also support the immune system, helping the body fight off infections and inflammation that can lead to skin breakouts and other skin problems.
remedy_recipe: To make Pau d'Arco tea for clear skin, start by boiling 2 cups of water in a pot, then add 2 teaspoons of dried Pau d'Arco bark and let it simmer for 15-20 minutes.
After simmering, remove the pot from heat and strain the tea to remove the bark, then allow the liquid to cool down to a comfortable drinking temperature.
To enhance the tea's benefits for clear skin, consider adding 1 tablespoon of raw honey and stirring until fully dissolved.
For daily consumption, prepare a fresh batch of Pau d'Arco tea every 24 hours, as it's important to consume it while it's still fresh.
To serve, pour the tea into a glass or mug, and enjoy it as a soothing and supportive beverage for maintaining clear skin.

remedies.remedy_desc: Licorice root tea helps with clear skin because it contains active compounds, such as glycyrrhizin, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. These compounds can help reduce inflammation and fight bacteria that can contribute to skin issues like acne. Additionally, licorice root may inhibit the production of excess melanin, helping to fade dark spots and promote a more even skin tone. Furthermore, licorice root tea has been found to have potential benefits for adrenal function, which can influence hormonal balances in the body, potentially reducing hormonal acne. Lastly, drinking licorice root tea can support overall health and well-being, as it provides antioxidants and helps to decrease stress, both of which can positively impact skin health.
remedy_recipe: In a saucepan, combine 1 teaspoon of dried licorice root with 8 ounces of water, and bring the mixture to a boil; allow it to simmer for 10 minutes to extract the beneficial compounds from the licorice root.
Strain the tea through a fine-mesh sieve into a teacup or mug, discarding the spent licorice root solids.
Optional: Add a touch of honey or lemon to taste, as these ingredients can complement the flavor of the licorice root tea while also providing additional skin-boosting nutrients.
Allow the tea to cool slightly, ensuring it's still warm but not scalding hot, as beverages that are too hot can exacerbate skin issues.
Sip the licorice root tea slowly, taking time to enjoy the soothing warmth and aroma, and repeat this process up to three times a day for best results.

remedies.remedy_desc: Marshmallow root tea helps with clear skin because it has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can reduce redness and fight acne-causing bacteria. It also contains mucilage, a substance that forms a soothing, protective film on the skin, helping to reduce irritation and promote healing. Furthermore, marshmallow root tea has been shown to have antioxidant effects, which can help protect the skin from damage and slow down the aging process. Additionally, it has demulcent properties, meaning it can help to moisturize and soften the skin, reducing the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles. Finally, regular consumption of marshmallow root tea can support overall immune function and help to reduce stress, both of which can have a positive impact on skin health.
remedy_recipe: In a quart-sized glass jar, combine 1 ounce of dried marshmallow root with 1 liter of boiling water, then tightly cover and let steep for at least 4-6 hours or overnight for best results.
After steeping, carefully strain the tea using a cheesecloth or fine mesh strainer into a clean glass container or mug, discarding the spent marshmallow root.
Gently warm the marshmallow root tea on low heat if desired, but do not allow it to boil, as this can damage the beneficial compounds.
For clear skin, drink 2-3 cups of marshmallow root tea daily, sipping slowly and allowing it to coat your mouth and throat.
Store any remaining tea in the refrigerator for up to 3 days, reheating as needed for additional servings.

remedies.remedy_desc: Calendula tea helps with clear skin because it has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help reduce redness and swelling of acne, as well as fight the bacteria that cause acne. The tea is also rich in antioxidants that help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can lead to premature aging and skin damage. Furthermore, calendula tea is known to improve blood flow, which helps in delivering essential nutrients to the skin, promoting cell regeneration and healing. Additionally, drinking calendula tea can help reduce stress and anxiety, which can also contribute to skin problems. Lastly, calendula tea can be used topically as a compress or added to a bath to soothe and calm irritated skin, providing a gentle and natural way to achieve clear and healthy skin.
remedy_recipe: To make calendula tea for clear skin, start by boiling 1 cup of water in a saucepan, then add 1-2 teaspoons of dried calendula flowers and let it steep for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the tea to remove the flowers, and allow the liquid to cool down to a comfortable drinking temperature.
For added skin-clearing benefits, squeeze the juice of half a lemon into the tea and stir in 1-2 teaspoons of raw honey.
Drink the calendula tea twice a day, once in the morning and once in the evening, for at least two weeks to see improvements in your skin's clarity.

To enhance the effects, use the leftover calendula flowers as a facial steam by placing them in a bowl of hot water, leaning over the bowl, and covering your head with a towel to trap the steam for 5-10 minutes.

remedies.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba tea helps with clear skin because it has strong antioxidant properties that fight off free radicals and protect skin cells from damage, reducing the likelihood of breakouts and inflammation. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory effects help soothe irritated skin, calming redness and swelling associated with acne or other skin conditions. Ginkgo biloba tea also improves blood circulation, ensuring that nutrients reach the skin efficiently, promoting cell growth and regeneration for a healthier, more radiant complexion. Furthermore, its antibacterial properties help eliminate acne-causing bacteria, preventing the spread of infection and reducing the risk of scarring. Lastly, ginkgo biloba tea's rich antioxidant content aids in reducing oxidative stress, which can contribute to premature aging and skin damage, ultimately leading to a clearer, smoother, and more youthful appearance.
remedy_recipe: To make ginkgo biloba tea for clear skin, start by boiling 2 cups of water in a pot, then add 1-2 teaspoons of dried ginkgo biloba leaves and let it simmer for 10-15 minutes.

While the tea is steeping, prepare a chamomile and lavender infusion by combining 1 teaspoon of dried chamomile flowers and 1/2 teaspoon of dried lavender flowers in a separate cup, then pouring boiling water over them and letting it steep for 5-7 minutes.
After both the ginkgo biloba tea and the herbal infusion are ready, strain the liquid from both mixtures into a large mug or teapot.
Combine the two liquids and add honey or lemon to taste, if desired.

Drink this tea up to twice a day for clearer skin, but make sure to consult with a healthcare professional before consuming ginkgo biloba if you are taking any medications or have pre-existing medical conditions.

remedies.remedy_desc: Gotu kola tea helps with clear skin because it contains potent antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that work together to reduce skin inflammation, fight free radicals, and promote skin cell regeneration. These properties also help to improve blood flow, which ensures that the skin receives adequate nutrients and oxygen necessary for maintaining a healthy and radiant complexion. Furthermore, gotu kola tea has been shown to reduce excess oil production, which can lead to acne and other skin blemishes. Additionally, its antibacterial properties help to eliminate acne-causing bacteria, while its soothing effects help to calm and heal irritated skin. Therefore, incorporating gotu kola tea into your daily routine can help you achieve clearer, healthier-looking skin.
remedy_recipe: In a small pot, bring 2 cups of water to a boil, then reduce heat to low and add 1 tablespoon of dried gotu kola leaves, letting it simmer for 10-15 minutes.
While the tea is steeping, rinse a tea infuser or teapot with a built-in strainer with water.
Once the tea has finished steeping, carefully pour the liquid through the tea infuser or directly into the teapot, separating the leaves from the tea.
Add honey or lemon to taste, if desired, and let the tea cool down to a drinkable temperature.
Serve and enjoy this soothing and potentially skin-clarifying gotu kola tea, preferably 1-2 times a day, consistently over several weeks for best results.

remedies.remedy_desc: Rooibos tea helps with clear skin because it contains high levels of antioxidants, including aspalathin and quercetin, which fight free radicals and reduce inflammation, helping to soothe skin and prevent breakouts. Additionally, rooibos is rich in alpha hydroxy acid (AHA) and zinc, which are known for their skincare benefits, such as promoting healthy cell turnover and regulating oil production. Furthermore, rooibos tea has anti-microbial properties that can help to eliminate bacteria on the skin, reducing the likelihood of acne and other skin blemishes. Drinking rooibos tea regularly can also help to boost the immune system and reduce stress, both of which can contribute to healthier skin. Lastly, rooibos tea is caffeine-free and hydrating, making it a great alternative to other beverages that can dehydrate the skin and lead to premature aging and skin problems.
remedy_recipe: Boil 2 cups of filtered water and allow it to cool slightly to around 200°F (93°C).
Place 2 rooibos tea bags into the water and steep for 5-7 minutes to extract the beneficial antioxidants.
While the tea is steeping, add 1 teaspoon of honey to enhance the tea's flavor and promote skin health.
After steeping, remove the tea bags and let the tea cool to a comfortable drinking temperature.
Enjoy a cup daily, preferably in the morning, to harness rooibos tea's anti-inflammatory properties and promote clear, radiant skin.

remedies.remedy_desc: Spearmint tea helps with clear skin because it contains anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can reduce redness and prevent acne-causing bacteria. Additionally, spearmint has been shown to have anti-androgenic effects, which can help regulate hormonal imbalances that can lead to acne. Furthermore, spearmint tea is rich in antioxidants that can help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and promote skin cell regeneration. Drinking spearmint tea regularly may also help reduce stress and anxiety, which can contribute to skin issues. Overall, spearmint tea can be a natural and effective addition to a skincare routine for those looking to achieve clearer, healthier skin.
remedy_recipe: To make spearmint tea, boil 2 cups of water and steep 1-2 teaspoons of dried spearmint leaves (or 2-4 teaspoons of fresh spearmint leaves) for 5-10 minutes; the longer the steeping time, the stronger the tea.
Strain the tea to remove the leaves, and let it cool down to a drinkable temperature.
For best results, drink 2-3 cups of spearmint tea daily, preferably between meals, as consistent consumption is key for improving skin clarity.
To enhance the benefits for clear skin, consider adding 1 teaspoon of raw honey or a squeeze of lemon juice before drinking, as they have natural antibacterial properties.
Monitor your skin's progress over 4-6 weeks, and adjust your tea intake as needed, as spearmint tea's positive effects on skin clarity may vary from person to person.

remedies.remedy_desc: Chamomile tea helps with clear skin because it has anti-inflammatory and healing properties that can reduce redness and irritation, making it an effective treatment for acne and other skin conditions. The tea's antioxidants, including flavonoids and essential oils, can help fight free radicals and reduce the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, promoting a more youthful and even complexion. Additionally, chamomile has antibacterial and antimicrobial properties that can help prevent and treat skin infections, while its soothing and calming effects can help reduce stress and promote better sleep, both of which are important for maintaining healthy skin. Drinking chamomile tea regularly can also help support the body's natural detoxification processes, which can improve overall skin health and appearance. Overall, chamomile tea is a gentle and natural remedy for promoting clear, healthy, and radiant skin.
remedy_recipe: To make chamomile tea for clear skin, start by boiling 1 cup of water and adding 1 tablespoon of dried chamomile flowers or 2 chamomile tea bags.
Allow the water and chamomile to steep for 5-7 minutes in a covered container to help release the beneficial compounds and achieve a strong tea flavor.
Strain the tea to remove the chamomile flowers or discard the tea bags.
Optional: For added skin benefits, squeeze half a lemon (approximately 1-2 tablespoons of fresh lemon juice) into the tea for its vitamin C content and antibacterial properties.
Drink the chamomile tea warm, twice a day, for at least a month to see improvements in your skin's clarity and overall health.

title: best herbal teas for clear skin
